'''âl-th-n''' ('''kalathan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hemodialyze|hemodialyze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hemodialyze|hemodialyze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-th-n
|-
! Lemma
| kalathan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilathan|thilathan]] || [[word:jilathan|jilathan]] || [[word:shilathan|shilathan]] || [[word:kilathan|kilathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulathan|thuthulathan]] || [[word:jujulathan|jujulathan]] || [[word:shushulathan|shushulathan]] || [[word:kukulathan|kukulathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulathan|thulathan]] || [[word:julathan|julathan]] || [[word:shulathan|shulathan]] || [[word:kulathan|kulathan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulathan|thulathan]] || [[word:julathan|julathan]] || [[word:shulathan|shulathan]] || [[word:kulathan|kulathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelathan|thelathan]] || [[word:jelathan|jelathan]] || [[word:shelathan|shelathan]] || [[word:kelathan|kelathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholathan|thotholathan]] || [[word:jojolathan|jojolathan]] || [[word:shosholathan|shosholathan]] || [[word:kokolathan|kokolathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholathan|tholathan]] || [[word:jolathan|jolathan]] || [[word:sholathan|sholathan]] || [[word:kolathan|kolathan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholathan|tholathan]] || [[word:jolathan|jolathan]] || [[word:sholathan|sholathan]] || [[word:kolathan|kolathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlathan|thĂŠlathan]] || [[word:jĂŠlathan|jĂŠlathan]] || [[word:shĂŠlathan|shĂŠlathan]] || [[word:kĂŠlathan|kĂŠlathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalathan|thathalathan]] || [[word:jajalathan|jajalathan]] || [[word:shashalathan|shashalathan]] || [[word:kakalathan|kakalathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalathan|thalathan]] || [[word:jalathan|jalathan]] || [[word:shalathan|shalathan]] || [[word:kalathan|kalathan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalathan|thalathan]] || [[word:jalathan|jalathan]] || [[word:shalathan|shalathan]] || [[word:kalathan|kalathan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalathan|shalathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalathan|goshalathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalathan|gokishalathan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalathanĂŒ|shalathanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalathanknĂŒ|goshalathanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalathanĂŒ|gokishalathanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalathanshĂ«|shalathanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalathankshĂ«|goshalathankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalathanshĂ«|gokishalathanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalathanro|shalathanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalathankro|goshalathankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalathanro|gokishalathanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalathanmu|shalathanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalathankmu|goshalathankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalathanmu|gokishalathanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalathansher|shalathansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalathanksher|goshalathanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalathansher|gokishalathansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalathang|shalathang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalathankng|goshalathankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalathang|gokishalathang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalathanya|shalathanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalathankya|goshalathankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalathanya|gokishalathanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalathanyam|shalathanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalathankyam|goshalathankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalathanyam|gokishalathanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalathanĂŒshĂ«|shalathanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalathanknĂŒshĂ«|goshalathanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalathanĂŒshĂ«|gokishalathanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalathanĂŒro|shalathanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalathanknĂŒro|goshalathanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalathanĂŒro|gokishalathanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalathanĂŒmu|shalathanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalathanknĂŒmu|goshalathanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalathanĂŒmu|gokishalathanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalathanshĂ«nĂŒ|shalathanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalathankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalathankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalathanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalathanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalathanshĂ«ro|shalathanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalathankshĂ«ro|goshalathankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalathanshĂ«ro|gokishalathanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalathanshĂ«mu|shalathanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalathankshĂ«mu|goshalathankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalathanshĂ«mu|gokishalathanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalathanronĂŒ|shalathanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalathankronĂŒ|goshalathankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalathanronĂŒ|gokishalathanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalathanroshĂ«|shalathanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalathankroshĂ«|goshalathankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalathanroshĂ«|gokishalathanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalathanromu|shalathanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalathankromu|goshalathankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalathanromu|gokishalathanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalathanmunĂŒ|shalathanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalathankmunĂŒ|goshalathankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalathanmunĂŒ|gokishalathanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalathanmushĂ«|shalathanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalathankmushĂ«|goshalathankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalathanmushĂ«|gokishalathanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalathanmuro|shalathanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalathankmuro|goshalathankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalathanmuro|gokishalathanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
